The question is asking to determine the number of Belgians who have won the Abel Prize. Since each row represents a laureate or group of laureates and the "citizenship" column indicates the nationality of each laureate, we need to group by the "citizenship" column to check how many Belgians have won the prize. We can use the f_group_column(citizenship) operation to group the laureates based on their citizenship to analyze this situation.

In the first row, Jacques Tits is listed with Belgian/French citizenship, which means he is Belgian. In the second row, Pierre Deligne is listed as Belgian. Therefore, there are 2 Belgians who have won the Abel Prize.
